arguments.task: Open official Klaviyo pages and extract evidence for these fields only from first-party content: one-line product description, documented authentication methods for the developer APIs, API surface type (REST and/or GraphQL), breadth of API coverage, rate limit notes, whether access is self-serve free/trial/paid/admin-gated/partner-gated based on official pricing or developer pages, and whether an official MCP server exists. Prefer canonical pages under developers.klaviyo.com or official Klaviyo pricing/product pages. Return the exact URLs visited and concise supported findings. Do not use third-party sites or search-result snippets.

input.thought: Use browser automation to read official Klaviyo docs and pricing pages for verifiable evidence.

results_truncated: {"_meta": null, "content": [{"type": "text", "text": "{\"data\":{\"results\":[{\"response\":{\"successful\":true,\"data\":{\"current_goal\":\"\",\"current_step\":7,\"current_url\":\"https://www.klaviyo.com/pricing\",\"id\":\"8b13a755-49d5-4570-96f5-2c989b99b666\",\"isSuccess\":true,\"output\":\"Klaviyo's official documentation and pricing pages provided the following details:\\n- **One-line product description**: Klaviyo is a powerful email and SMS marketing tool with a strong commitment to data science.\\n- **Documented authentication methods**: Private API Keys (server-side), OAuth (for partners and integrations), and Public API Keys/Site ID (client-side).\\n- **API surface type**: REST (utilizing JSON:API standards and standard HTTP methods).\\n- **Breadth of API coverage**: Extensive, covering Accounts, Campaigns, Catalogs, Coupons, Custom Objects, Events, Flows, Forms, Lists, Metrics, Profiles, Reporting, Segments, Webhooks, and more.\\n- **Rate limit notes**: Fixed-window algorithm with burst (1s) and steady (1m) limits. Buckets range from XS (1/s, 15/m) to XL (350/s, 3500/m). Uses `Retry-After` and `RateLimit` headers.\\n- **Access type**: Self-serve free plan available (up to 250 profiles); paid tiers scale based on profiles and message volume.\\n- **Official MCP server**: Confirmed existence (documented as 'Klaviyo MCP server' in the developer sidebar).\\n\\n**URLs Visited:**\\n- https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/docs/get_started\\n- https://developers.klaviyo.com/en...[truncated]

raw_result.description: Email and SMS marketing platform with customer data and automation APIs.
raw_result.auth_notes: Official docs describe OAuth for third-party integrations, Private API Keys for server-side API use, and Public API Keys / Site ID for client-side use.
raw_result.gating_reason: Official pricing page offers a free plan with 'Start for free' and usage limits, indicating self-serve access.

api_surface.breadth: Extensive REST API covering accounts, campaigns, catalogs, coupons, custom objects, events, flows, forms, lists, metrics, profiles, reporting, segments, tags, templates, web feeds, webhooks, and related resources.
api_surface.mcp_notes: Official developer docs include a documented 'Klaviyo MCP server' page/link in the developer portal.

raw_result.rate_limit_notes: Official rate-limit docs describe fixed-window burst (1 second) and steady (1 minute) limits, bucketed from XS (1/s, 15/m) to XL (350/s, 3500/m), with RateLimit and Retry-After headers.
raw_result.notable_signals: Developer portal is public and detailed, documents JSON:API-based REST usage, multiple auth modes, rate-limit behavior, broad endpoint coverage, and an official MCP server.
